notes_for_human_reviewer: INTERMEDIATE-HIGH — a genuinely good read that passes and sits right at the hire-ready line. Catches the Priya/Tom pre-alignment (grounded in the verbatim echo) and the deferred-decision signal, grounds them, gives concrete prep (pre-brief the sponsor, prep both a keep-case and a fast-follow version), stays cleanly on the helpful side, and marks it discreet. The gap from a clear 5 is channel coverage: it misses the Lena↔sponsor indirect-advocacy thread and the absence channel (un-invited vendor lead, unraised conformance timeline), so channel_reading is 4 not 5. Expect 4s with integrity at 5. This fixture deliberately tests the 4-vs-5 boundary on channel_reading — a solid partial read vs the full four-channel read.
